commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh When I blow with a trumpet, I and all that are with me, then blow you the trumpets also on every side of all the camp, and say, The sword of the LORD, and of Gideon. Camp, and shout together to the Lord and to Gedeon: or rather "the sword of, ver. The war is the Lord's, victory to or by the hand of Gedeon "Chaldean. He is the minister of God's justice to punish Madian. (Menochius) It is no derogation to God (Calmet) that honour is given to his servants. (Worthington) Protestants supply the word which seems to be wanting. The sword of the Lord (Haydock).
